member.summary: Preset for changing the playback speed of a video file using FFmpeg. Supports both video and audio speed adjustments with proper filtering. Uses atempo filter for audio (0.5-2.0 range) and setpts filter for video. For factors outside 0.5-2.0, atempo filters are chained together.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: Path where the speed-adjusted video will be saved.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.WithSpeed(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the playback speed factor. A value of 1.0 means normal speed, 2.0 means double speed, 0.5 means half speed.
member.param: The speed factor to apply (e.g., 2.0 for 2x speed).
member.returns: The current instance of for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.PreservePitch(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures whether to preserve the original audio pitch when changing speed. When true, uses the "rubberband" filter for high-quality pitch preservation. When false, audio will be higher or lower in pitch with the speed change.
member.param: Whether to preserve audio pitch (default: false).
member.returns: The current instance of for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.WithReencode(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the preset to re-encode the output using the specified codecs.
member.param: Video codec to use (e.g., "libx264"). Defaults to "copy" if not specified.
Audio codec to use (e.g., "aac"). Defaults to "copy" if not specified.
member.returns: The current instance of for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.Build
member.summary: Builds the FFmpeg command for the speed adjustment operation.
member.returns: A configured instance.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.BuildArguments
member.summary: Builds the argument list that will be passed to ffmpeg.
member.returns: A string array containing the FFmpeg arguments.

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.Run(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the speed adjustment operation using FFmpeg.
member.param: Path to the ffmpeg executable. Defaults to "ffmpeg".

member.name: M:FFmpegFluent.SpeedPreset.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the preset configuration.
